ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "fully_diluted" REAL /* Fully diluted market capitalization of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency ID */,
  "source_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange from which the price data was collected */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous timestamp */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrency_prices_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the watchlist was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist the item belongs to */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the item was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the watchlist item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was last triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notification (e.g., immediately, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
